name: Staff of Striking
description: This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges. When you hit with a melee attack using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 1d6 force damage to the target. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff loses its magic and becomes a nonmagical quarterstaff.

recharge.destruction_roll: d20 on last charge, 1 makes it nonmagical

special_ability.name: Striking Force
special_ability.trigger: When you hit with a melee attack
special_ability.effect: Deal an extra 1d6 force damage to the target

attunement.description: You must attune to this staff by holding it for 1 hour during which you must maintain concentration as if you were casting a spell.

activation.description: Use as a quarterstaff or expend charge when making melee hit

notes: This staff combines a magical weapon with a limited-use special ability. It's suitable for martial characters who want some magical power without being a spellcaster.
